properties.name: Duhok
properties.description: Increasing water scarcity in mountainous areas and impacts on local agriculture.
properties.sourceReference: World Bank CCKP (temperature), FAO AQUASTAT (drought/water stress), IPCC AR6 WGII (desertification context)
